# GptImage2Api

## Overview

GptImage2Api is an independent GPT Image 2 API website at [https://gptimage2api.net](https://gptimage2api.net). It provides API access for developers, startups, and businesses that want to generate high-quality AI images through simple REST endpoints, build image generation applications, automate creative workflows, or integrate GPT Image 2 API access into products.

The site states that it is an independent product and is not affiliated with Google, OpenAI, or other AI model providers.

## Target Users

- Developers integrating AI image generation into apps, websites, and internal tools.
- Startups and businesses building image generation workflows.
- Product and creative teams that need API-friendly image generation and editing workflows.
- Visitors comparing examples, prompts, pricing, documentation, and public articles before signing in.

## Core Features

- GPT Image 2 API access through REST-oriented workflows.
- AI image generation for apps, creative automation, and product integrations.
- Public showcase pages for generated work that can be inspected by visitors.
- Public prompt gallery for GPT Image 2 prompts.
- Pricing information for subscriptions, credit packs, and payment options.
- Public API documentation for access setup, generation tasks, task status, generation history, and credit checks.
- Blog resources about GPT image API workflows and product usage.

## Primary Pages

- [Home](https://gptimage2api.net) - Main public entry point for GptImage2Api.
- [Features](https://gptimage2api.net/#features) - Public homepage feature section linked from the header and footer.
- [Showcase](https://gptimage2api.net/showcase) - Browse public successful generations and open details to review prompts, parameters, and results.
- [Prompts](https://gptimage2api.net/prompts) - Curated GPT Image 2 prompt library for reusable image generation prompts.
- [Blog](https://gptimage2api.net/blog) - Public articles about AI image creation, product updates, and creator workflows.
- [Pricing](https://gptimage2api.net/pricing) - Subscription plans, credit packs, and payment options for GptImage2Api.
- [API Docs](https://gptimage2api.net/apidoc) - Public AI Studio API documentation for access setup, generation, task status, history, and credits.
- [About / Contact](https://gptimage2api.net/about#contact-us) - About page and public contact section.

## Localized Pages

Supported locales are configured as English, 中文, and 日本語. English is the default locale and uses root paths. Chinese and Japanese use locale-prefixed paths.

### English

- [Gpt Image 2 Api](https://gptimage2api.net) - Gpt Image 2 Api - Fast & Reliable GPT Image 2 API for Developers.
- [Features](https://gptimage2api.net/#features) - Public homepage feature section.
- [Showcase](https://gptimage2api.net/showcase) - GptImage2Api - Fast & Reliable GPT Image 2 API for Developers.
- [GPT Image 2 API awesome prompts](https://gptimage2api.net/prompts) - Curated GPT Image 2 prompt library for text rendering, cross-image consistency, and illustration workflows.
- [Blog Posts](https://gptimage2api.net/blog) - Insights on AI image creation, product updates, and creator workflows.
- [GptImage2Api Pricing](https://gptimage2api.net/pricing) - View subscription plans, credit packs, and payment options for GptImage2Api.
- [AI Studio API Documentation](https://gptimage2api.net/apidoc) - Learn access setup, generation tasks, task status, generation history, and user credits.
- [About](https://gptimage2api.net/about#contact-us) - About page and contact section.

### 中文

- [Gpt Image 2 Api](https://gptimage2api.net/zh) - Gpt Image 2 Api - 面向开发者的快速可靠 GPT Image 2 API。
- [功能特性](https://gptimage2api.net/zh#features) - 首页公开功能区。
- [seedance 2.0 作品展示](https://gptimage2api.net/zh/showcase) - 浏览社区中公开且生成成功的作品，查看提示词、参数和结果。
- [GPT Image 2 API 超赞提示词](https://gptimage2api.net/zh/prompts) - 精选 GPT Image 2 提示词库，面向文字渲染、跨图一致性和插画创作。
- [博客列表](https://gptimage2api.net/zh/blog) - 分享 AI 图像创作经验、产品更新与创作者实战内容。
- [GptImage2Api 价格](https://gptimage2api.net/zh/pricing) - 查看 GptImage2Api 的订阅套餐、积分包和支付方式。
- [AI Studio API 文档](https://gptimage2api.net/zh/apidoc) - 了解鉴权、生成任务、任务状态查询、生成记录读取和用户积分查询方式。
- [关于我们](https://gptimage2api.net/zh/about#contact-us) - 关于页面与联系方式。

### 日本語

- [Gpt Image 2 Api](https://gptimage2api.net/ja) - Gpt Image 2 Api - 開発者向けの高速で信頼性の高い GPT Image 2 API。
- [機能特性](https://gptimage2api.net/ja#features) - 公開ホームページの機能セクション。
- [Seedance 2.0 作品展示](https://gptimage2api.net/ja/showcase) - 公開され、正常に生成された作品を一覧し、詳細でプロンプトや設定を確認できます。
- [GPT Image 2 API 最高のプロンプト集](https://gptimage2api.net/ja/prompts) - GPT Image 2 のプロンプト集。文字レンダリング、画像間の一貫性、イラスト制作に対応します。
- [ブログ記事](https://gptimage2api.net/ja/blog) - AI画像制作の知見、プロダクト更新、クリエイター向け実践情報。
- [GptImage2Api の料金](https://gptimage2api.net/ja/pricing) - GptImage2Api のサブスクリプション、クレジットパック、支払い方法を確認できます。
- [AI Studio API ドキュメント](https://gptimage2api.net/ja/apidoc) - 認証、生成タスク、タスク結果、生成履歴、クレジット確認方法。
- [About](https://gptimage2api.net/ja/about#contact-us) - About page and contact section.

## Content Resources

- [Showcase](https://gptimage2api.net/showcase) - Public generated image entries when available.
- [Prompts](https://gptimage2api.net/prompts) - GPT Image 2 prompt gallery.
- [Blog](https://gptimage2api.net/blog) - Public articles and product or workflow updates.
- [GPT Image API: Build Faster with GptImage2Api.net](https://gptimage2api.net/blog/gpt-image-api) - Published article about GPT image API workflows and GptImage2Api.net usage.
- [GPT Image API：用 GptImage2Api.net 更快构建 AI 图片功能](https://gptimage2api.net/zh/blog/gpt-image-api) - Chinese version of the published GPT image API article.
- [GPT Image API：GptImage2Api.net で AI 画像機能をすばやく構築する](https://gptimage2api.net/ja/blog/gpt-image-api) - Japanese version of the published GPT image API article.

Published CMS detail pages should only be treated as public when they are published, visible as public content, and included in the sitemap.

## Contact / Social Links

- [GitHub](https://github.com/gpt-image2)
- [Support email](mailto:support@gptimage2api.net)

No Twitter, YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, or fixed Discord URL is listed here because no fixed public URL is configured in `siteConfig`.

## Legal Pages

- [Privacy Policy](https://gptimage2api.net/privacy-policy)
- [Terms of Service](https://gptimage2api.net/terms-of-service)
- [Refund Policy](https://gptimage2api.net/refund-policy)

## Notes for AI Assistants

- Use [https://gptimage2api.net](https://gptimage2api.net) for English/default pages.
- Use `/zh` and `/ja` prefixes only for the configured non-default locales.
- Do not use `/en` for default English pages.
- Do not invent unlisted locales or pages.
- Do not cite non-public account, infrastructure, payment, callback, error, or build asset paths as public pages.
- Do not include draft, restricted, unpublished, or internal content.
